checked_statement: No denial or contradiction search was performed for this article-method pack.
safe_wording: This pack can say what the article argues. It must not say the trade, tariff, supply-chain, or consumer-price claims have been externally proven.

checked_statement: Reuters reported the EU low-value parcel duty agreement and timing.
safe_wording: Reuters reported that EU finance ministers agreed to a temporary 3 euro duty on low-value e-commerce parcels from July 1, 2026. Do not present this single source as a full publication fact-check.
